description: Layout orchestration for data-heavy views with metric KPI tiles, sidebar navigation, and tabbed content panels.

intent.summary: When the user asks for a dashboard or analytics view, refer to the AgnosticUI Discovery Dashboard Playbook.

recipe.layout: Sidebar navigation on the left, fixed Header across the top, main content area on the right. Main area: horizontal stats bar (3-4 metric AgCard tiles) above a tabbed content section.

components.role: Persistent left-nav with icon links to app sections
Top bar with logo, breadcrumb, and user avatar
Metric KPI tile in the top stats bar
Switch between content sections (Overview, Reports, Users)
Status indicator on data rows (Active, Pending, Error)
User profile in the top-right header area
Placeholder shown while async data loads
Primary actions such as Export or Add New

recipe.notes:
Group metric cards in a horizontal flex container. Each card follows this shape:
```json
[
  { "id": "metric-revenue", "component": "AgCard", "children": ["metric-label", "metric-value"] },
  { "id": "metric-label",   "component": "AgText", "text": "Revenue", "el": "p" },
  { "id": "metric-value",   "component": "AgText", "text": "$12,400", "el": "h2" }
]
```
